Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: For their season finale, Paul and Ray tackle a remote lake adventure with a precarious beaver dam to navigate. With help from Dan and Ben, the team enjoys a day full of thrilling walleye and bass fishing. The perfect finish? A shore lunch at camp with Outdoor Flavours adding unforgettable flavor to their catch.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Remote Lake Showdown

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.grandparentTitle: Spring Fishing Tips and Tricks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim and Capt Chris Adams, sight fish for Redfish at Mosquito Lagoon on the east coast of Florida.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | Redfish at Mosquito Lagoon
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James Lindner and Jake Wallace spend the day on Lake Vermilion catching smallmouth bass in the shallows on classic tubes.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Shallow Water Smallmouth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jeremy Smith and Dan Lindner roll up their sleeves for a seek and destroy mission to find big summer bluegills.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Finding Summer Blue Gills
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: If you're a bass fisherman, you have most likely heard of the world-class Lake El Salto. Dave Brown from Okuma Fishing Tackle and professional bass fisherman Todd Kline rally up with Savage Gear and test out their rat and duck lures on this Stoked On Fishing adventure.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Largemouth Bass Fishing at Lake El Salto, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman delivers top tips on how to catch the biggest fish in the best spots.
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Perry's Pond
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: At Venice, Louisiana, Shaw fishes with renowned captain Mike Frenette for trophy redfish.
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast — Venice Reds
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Going camping and trout fishing in the Sierras is one of our favorite things to do. For the first time, Shea McIntee and the crew head down to South Lake Bishop. What makes this trip unique is that we get to fish with some good friends.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - An Unforgettable Trip, South Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al Lindner and Ty Sjodin have so much fun in North Dakota where the feedbag is on.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Fantastic Fishing In North Dakota
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join us as we kick off Season 7 with an unforgettable adventure north of Cochrane, Ontario, on the pristine waters of Pierre Lake. We team up with Mark Froud from Dunn Right Outfitters, an expert in Northern Ontario fishing, to target trophy walleye. Experience the thrill of reeling in massive catches while surrounded by breathtaking wilderness, and gain valuable tips and insights from Mark to enhance your own fishing techniques. This episode sets the tone for a season filled with excitement, exploration, and exceptional angling.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | "Trophy Walleye Adventure on Pierre Lake"
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This week on larry smith we head north to lake superior in search of some big ole lakers! Stay Tuned!
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Superior Lake Trout
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This week on larry smith the dynamic duo is back for an action packed walleye show out on the bay of green bay
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | EARLY Spring Walleyes Oconto
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Watch Korean War vet Charlie Gitzinger as he recounts his life in the military.
Video.grandparentTitle: Charlie Gitzinger
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe-Monday Morning Fisherman
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Monday Morning Fisherman
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shea McIntee and the crew spend day two of their two and a half-day fishing trip on the El Dorado sportfishing boat out of Long Beach Sportfishing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Bluefin Tuna and Yellowtail Fishing on the El Dorado, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shaw enjoys hard-hitting Deep-South bass action on jerkbaits at Live Oak Plantation.
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast — Live Oak Largemouths
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Experience Fishing in beautiful Algoma Country with young anglers learning about Bass fishing.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Bass For Youth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fly in with us to Blackbirch Lake with Gray Wood Outfitter for some non stop action
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Back to Blackbirch Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing can be very high-tech, but on the other end of the spectrum, it can actually be very simple. Today we're going to show you some presentations and tactics to put fish in the boat....easily!
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Easy Fishing Tactics
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This episode is all about Swimbaits, perhaps the most versatile tool in the tackle box for catching just about everything that swims.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - All About Swimbaits
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim visits Cast Industries to see how lure molds are made. Then he visits Lure Parts Online to show you how to pour your own soft plastic baits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Making Lure Molds & Pouring soft plastics
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Bass fishing in late summer can be tough, watch as Dusing shows ways to overcome the tough conditions.
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Late Summer Bass Smash
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows you, in detail how to build your own Ned Rig rod.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building A Ned Rig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: We're returning to one of our all-time favorite destinations in Baja, Mexico - Cedros Island, with Jose and Cedros Outdoor Adventures. People often ask us, 'Why do you return to Cedros Island?' The answer is straightforward: the fishing is absolutely ridiculous almost every single time. Our Stoked on Fishing charter makes a point of showing up in the middle of October for a reason. That reason? It's all about the variety of species available to catch, starting with yellowfin tuna, dorado, halibut, and the elusive Mr. Yellowtail. It's game time - let's go fishing in Baja!
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Cedros Island Goes Off, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing out west has been fantastic this year, but eventually, the fish move or disappear due to currents, weather, or heavy traffic. However, there are always some offshore banks that have resident fish on or around them year-round, and one of those spots is called the Cortez Bank. You can always guarantee one thing: if you make it 110 miles, you'll catch some big Rockfish. Additionally, if Mother Nature and currents work out in your favor, there can be some incredible Yellowtail fishing on the bank. Today, we're rallying up for our "Stoked On Fishing" day and a half charter on board the one and only El Dorado, a top vessel in the Long Beach sport fishing scene. With anticipation running high, we can't wait to cast our lines and see what kind of adventures await us on the open waters.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Party Boat El Dorado Takes on Cortez Bank
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On today's episode of AnglingBuzz TV, we're talking all about finding walleye and how to catch them! Our special guest is Jason Freed who's a fishing guide on Minnesota's famous Leech Lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Finding Walleye
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim talks with We FISH ASA Podcast and industry insider Dave Kranz about the fishing industry and more.
Video.grandparentTitle: Slickfish Radio | Industry Insider Dave Kranz
Video.title: Episode 1
